en: "At that time, declares the LORD, I will be the God of all the clans of Israel, and they shall be my people."
zh: “到那時，我必作以色列各家族的 神，他們要作我的子民。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Thus says the LORD: "The people who survived the sword found grace in the wilderness; when Israel sought for rest,
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “在刀劍下倖存的人民， 在曠野蒙受了恩寵； 以色列來到她安息之處。”

en: the LORD appeared to him from far away. I have loved you with an everlasting love; therefore I have continued my faithfulness to you.
zh: 耶和華在古時 曾向以色列 顯現，說： “我以永遠的愛愛你， 因此，我對你的慈愛延續不息 。

en: Again I will build you, and you shall be built, O virgin Israel! Again you shall adorn yourself with tambourines and shall go forth in the dance of the merrymakers.
zh: 童女以色列啊！ 我要再次建立你，你就必被建立。 你要再次拿起鈴鼓， 出去和那些歡樂的人一同跳舞。

en: Again you shall plant vineyards on the mountains of Samaria; the planters shall plant and shall enjoy the fruit.
zh: 你要再次在撒瑪利亞的眾山上栽種葡萄園， 栽種的人栽種了，必可享用所結的果子。

en: For there shall be a day when watchmen will call in the hill country of Ephraim: 'Arise, and let us go up to Zion, to the LORD our God.'"
zh: 因為有一天，守望的人要在以法蓮山上呼叫，說： ‘起來吧！我們上錫安去朝見耶和華我們的 神。’”

en: For thus says the LORD: "Sing aloud with gladness for Jacob, and raise shouts for the chief of the nations; proclaim, give praise, and say, 'O LORD, save your people, the remnant of Israel.'
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “你們要為雅各喜樂歡呼， 要為那在列國為首的呼喊。 你們要宣告，要頌讚，說： ‘耶和華啊！求你拯救你的子民， 就是以色列的餘民。’

en: Behold, I will bring them from the north country and gather them from the farthest parts of the earth, among them the blind and the lame, the pregnant woman and her who is in labor, together; a great company, they shall return here.
zh: 看哪！我必把他們從北方之地領回來， 把他們從地極招集起來； 在他們中間有瞎眼的、瘸腿的、 孕婦、產婦，都在一起； 他們成群結隊返回這裡。

en: With weeping they shall come, and with pleas for mercy I will lead them back, I will make them walk by brooks of water, in a straight path in which they shall not stumble, for I am a father to Israel, and Ephraim is my firstborn.
zh: 我引導他們的時候， 他們必哭著而來，並且向我乞恩懇求。 我要使他們走在溪水旁， 行在平直的路上，他們必不會絆跌； 因為我是以色列的父親， 以法蓮是我的長子。

en: "Hear the word of the LORD, O nations, and declare it in the coastlands far away; say, 'He who scattered Israel will gather him, and will keep him as a shepherd keeps his flock.'
zh: “列國啊！你們要聽耶和華的話， 要在遠方的海島傳揚，說： ‘那趕散以色列的 神，必再招集他們； 必看守他們，像牧人看守自己的羊群一樣。’

en: For the LORD has ransomed Jacob and has redeemed him from hands too strong for him.
zh: 因為耶和華買贖了雅各， 從比他更強的人手中把他救贖了出來。

en: They shall come and sing aloud on the height of Zion, and they shall be radiant over the goodness of the LORD, over the grain, the wine, and the oil, and over the young of the flock and the herd; their life shall be like a watered garden, and they shall languish no more.
zh: 他們必來到錫安的高處歡呼； 他們必容光煥發，因為耶和華賜他們各樣的美物， 就是五穀、新酒和油， 還有羊羔和牛犢。 他們必像有水灌溉的園子， 永不再枯乾。

en: Then shall the young women rejoice in the dance, and the young men and the old shall be merry. I will turn their mourning into joy; I will comfort them, and give them gladness for sorrow.
zh: 那時，童女必歡樂跳舞， 年輕的和年老的一起歡樂。 我必使他們的悲哀變為喜樂， 我必安慰他們， 使他們從憂愁中得著歡樂。

en: I will feast the soul of the priests with abundance, and my people shall be satisfied with my goodness, declares the LORD."
zh: 我必用肥脂使祭司的心滿足； 我的子民必因我的美物飽足。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Thus says the LORD: "A voice is heard in Ramah, lamentation and bitter weeping. Rachel is weeping for her children; she refuses to be comforted for her children, because they are no more."
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “在拉瑪聽見有聲音， 是痛哭哀號的聲音； 拉結為她的兒女哀哭， 不肯受安慰， 因為他們都不在了。”

en: Thus says the LORD: "Keep your voice from weeping, and your eyes from tears, for there is a reward for your work, declares the LORD, and they shall come back from the land of the enemy.
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “止住你的聲音，不要哭泣， 抑制你的眼睛不要再流淚， 因為你所作的必有果效； 他們必從仇敵之地回來。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: There is hope for your future, declares the LORD, and your children shall come back to their own country.
zh: “你的前途必有希望； 你的兒女必返回自己的地方。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: I have heard Ephraim grieving, 'You have disciplined me, and I was disciplined, like an untrained calf; bring me back that I may be restored, for you are the LORD my God.
zh: “我清楚聽見以法蓮為自己哀歎，說： ‘你管教了我， 我像一頭不馴服的牛犢受管教； 求你使我回轉，我就得以回轉， 因為你是耶和華我的 神。

en: For after I had turned away, I relented, and after I was instructed, I slapped my thigh; I was ashamed, and I was confounded, because I bore the disgrace of my youth.'
zh: 我回轉以後，就深深悔悟； 我醒覺以後，就拍腿悔恨。 因為我承受年幼時的恥辱， 我感到羞恥和慚愧。’

en: Is Ephraim my dear son? Is he my darling child? For as often as I speak against him, I do remember him still. Therefore my heart yearns for him; I will surely have mercy on him, declares the LORD.
zh: 以法蓮是我親愛的兒子嗎？ 是我喜悅的孩子嗎？ 每逢我說話攻擊他， 我必再次記念他。 因此，我的心戀慕他； 我必定憐憫他。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Set up road markers for yourself; make yourself guideposts; consider well the highway, the road by which you went. Return, O virgin Israel, return to these your cities.
zh: 你要為自己設立路標， 豎立路牌； 你要留心大路， 就是你走過的路。 童女以色列啊，回轉吧！ 回到你這些城市那裡。

en: How long will you waver, O faithless daughter? For the LORD has created a new thing on the earth: a woman encircles a man."
zh: 轉離正道的女兒哪， 你轉來轉去要到幾時呢？ 因為耶和華在地上創造了一件新事， 就是女的要環繞男的。

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: "Once more they shall use these words in the land of Judah and in its cities, when I restore their fortunes: "' The LORD bless you, O habitation of righteousness, O holy hill!'
zh: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：“我使被擄的人歸回的時候，他們在猶大地，在猶大的城鎮裡，必再說這樣的話：‘公義的居所啊，聖山哪，願耶和華賜福給你！’

en: And Judah and all its cities shall dwell there together, and the farmers and those who wander with their flocks.
zh: 猶大各城的人、耕地的和領著群畜遊牧的，都要一起住在猶大。

en: For I will satisfy the weary soul, and every languishing soul I will replenish."
zh: 疲倦的人，我必使他振作；愁苦的人，我必使他滿足。”

en: At this I awoke and looked, and my sleep was pleasant to me.
zh: 這時，我醒過來，四周觀看；我睡得很香甜。

en: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will sow the house of Israel and the house of Judah with the seed of man and the seed of beast.
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，我必使以色列家和猶大家人口和牲畜繁衍。

en: And it shall come to pass that as I have watched over them to pluck up and break down, to overthrow, destroy, and bring harm, so I will watch over them to build and to plant, declares the LORD.
zh: 我先前怎樣留意把他們拔出、拆毀、傾覆、毀滅和降災；將來我也必照樣留意把他們建立和栽種起來。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: In those days they shall no longer say: "' The fathers have eaten sour grapes, and the children's teeth are set on edge.'
zh: “在那些日子，人必不再說： ‘父親吃了酸葡萄， 兒子的牙齒酸倒了。’

en: But everyone shall die for his own sin. Each man who eats sour grapes, his teeth shall be set on edge.
zh: 因為各人必因自己的罪孽死亡；吃酸葡萄的，那人的牙齒必酸倒。

en: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and the house of Judah,
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，我要與以色列家和猶大家訂立新的約。

en: not like the covenant that I made with their fathers on the day when I took them by the hand to bring them out of the land of Egypt, my covenant that they broke, though I was their husband, declares the LORD.
zh: 這新約不像從前我拉他們祖先的手，領他們出埃及地的日子，與他們所立的約；我雖然是他們的丈夫，他們卻違背了我的約。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: But this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, declares the LORD: I will put my law within them, and I will write it on their hearts. And I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
zh: “但那些日子以後，我要與以色列家所立的約是這樣 ：我要把我的律法放在他們裡面，寫在他們的心裡。我要作他們的 神，他們要作我的子民。

en: And no longer shall each one teach his neighbor and each his brother, saying, 'Know the LORD,' for they shall all know me, from the least of them to the greatest, declares the LORD. For I will forgive their iniquity, and I will remember their sin no more."
zh: 他們各人必不再教導自己的鄰舍和自己的同胞，說：‘你們要認識耶和華。’因為所有的人，從最小到最大的都必認識我。我也要赦免他們的罪孽，不再記著他們的罪惡。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Thus says the LORD, who gives the sun for light by day and the fixed order of the moon and the stars for light by night, who stirs up the sea so that its waves roar- the LORD of hosts is his name:
zh: 那使太陽白晝發光， 派定月亮和星辰照耀黑夜， 又攪動海洋，使海浪澎湃的， 萬軍之耶和華是他的名， 他這樣說：

en: "If this fixed order departs from before me, declares the LORD, then shall the offspring of Israel cease from being a nation before me forever."
zh: “這些定律若能從我面前廢掉， 以色列的後裔也就會在我面前斷絕， 永遠不再成為一個國家。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Thus says the LORD: "If the heavens above can be measured, and the foundations of the earth below can be explored, then I will cast off all the offspring of Israel for all that they have done, declares the LORD."
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “人若能量度在上的諸天， 測透地下面的根基， 我也就會因以色列後裔所作的一切， 棄絕他們眾人。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when the city shall be rebuilt for the LORD from the tower of Hananel to the Corner Gate.
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，這城從哈楠業城樓直到角門，必為耶和華重建起來。

en: And the measuring line shall go out farther, straight to the hill Gareb, and shall then turn to Goah.
zh: 量度的準繩還要往外量，直到迦立山，繞到歌亞。

en: The whole valley of the dead bodies and the ashes, and all the fields as far as the brook Kidron, to the corner of the Horse Gate toward the east, shall be sacred to the LORD. It shall not be uprooted or overthrown anymore forever."
zh: 拋屍和倒灰的整個山谷，以及從汲淪溪直到東邊馬門拐角一帶所有的墓地，都必歸耶和華為聖，永遠不再拔出，不再傾覆。”
